description.p: qiftop is a Qt desktop application for monitoring network traffic in real time. It shows per-interface counters and per-connection flows in an iftop-like view designed for graphical desktops.

The graphical client pairs with qiftop-agent, a privileged D-Bus service that collects kernel network accounting while keeping the UI unprivileged. When available, the agent provides live connection data, interface statistics, and optional process and container attribution.
Filtering, sorting, rate smoothing, DNS names, and grouped views help identify bandwidth use by interface, process, container, protocol, address, and direction.

screenshot.caption: qiftop showing grouped live traffic and preferences
